value.found_quote: For Git repositories, each automation can run either in your local project or on a dedicated background [worktree](https://developers.openai.com/codex/app/features#worktree-support). Use worktrees when you want to isolate automation changes from unfinished local work.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes that automations in Git repositories can run on a dedicated background worktree to isolate automation changes from local work, directly substantiating the claim of worktree isolation for Git-repository automations.
